channel.title: Blog on Saltproject.io
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Saltproject.io

item.title: CVE Retro Artifact – Actions 2021-MAR
item.description: CVE Retro Artifact – Actions 2021-MAR April 1, 2021 - Sage Robins If you would like a branded PDF copy of this report please contact us at saltproject@vmware.com Actions Enhance collaboration between the Salt Project Core Team and the Working Groups. The Community and Program Manager will attend group meetings to facilitate writing project charters that will outlining goals, objectives, and set clear expectations. Working Groups will need to demonstrate progress towards these.
